2270730.name: Fishing Adventure: Finland Reserve
2270730.description:
Are you ready for a new fishing adventure? "Fishing Adventure: Finland Reserve" has arrived! This exciting new DLC takes you to the stunning Lake in Finland, where crystal-clear waters and diverse fish species await you.

Explore the winding waterways of the lake and discover hidden coves as you cast your line and try to reel in your biggest catch yet. With perch, zander, pike, salmon, and brown trout waiting to be caught, you'll have plenty of opportunities to test your angling skills and become a master fisherman.

But "Fishing Adventure: Finland Reserve" isn't just about fishing - it's also about exploring the breathtaking natural beauty of Finland. Take in the stunning scenery as you travel across the lake, from rocky coastlines to tranquil waters.

So pack your gear and get ready to embark on a new fishing adventure like no other.
2270730.supported_languages:
英语*, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 波兰语, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙, 简体中文, 土耳其语, 俄语
*具有完全音频支持的语言
